summary: Expose a typed WorkbenchStore accessor for the Agent Workbench candidate detail route.
rationale: WorkbenchStore is the BFF persistence facade. The candidate detail route must not query SQLite directly, so this change adds a narrow get_candidate_review_item facade method while keeping candidate storage and projection logic in focused modules.
verification: uv run ruff check src/seektalent_ui/agent_workbench_models.py src/seektalent_ui/agent_workbench_projection.py src/seektalent_ui/agent_workbench_routes.py src/seektalent_ui/workbench_store.py src/seektalent_ui/workbench_candidate_store.py src/seektalent_ui/workbench_candidate_display.py src/seektalent_ui/workbench_store_types.py src/seektalent_ui/workbench_schema.py tests/test_agent_workbench_contract.py
